user_request: Find references for coffee grinder adjustment mechanisms, grind-size collars, and tactile control interfaces. Prioritize mechanism detail and clear physical interaction.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Compact hand-crank coffee grinder with a visible grind-adjustment collar, textured grip body, and tactile mechanical controls in a utilitarian matte-dark finish with wood accent.
strengths: Clear coffee grinder mechanism and category relevance
Visible adjustment collar suggests grind-size reference value
Strong tactile interaction cues through the crank, knob, and textured body
Material contrast between matte metal, textured grip, and wood handle adds warmth
Simplified silhouette makes the mechanism easy to read
weaknesses: Product-render style feels promotional and slightly generic rather than highly refined
Mechanism detail is limited; internal adjustment/locking interface is not fully exposed
Visual hierarchy is a bit noisy with added burr inset and text callout
Overall form is common within hand grinder designs, offering limited originality
Dark CMF reduces visibility of fine interface details in parts of the body
